Let me re-read the game mechanics:
1. The bottom panels control which row group of the left control bars gets toggled.
2. Clicking on the active panel's yellow dots toggles the corresponding row group of the left control bars.
3. The right control bars can be toggled by clicking on them directly.
So the goal might be:
- Make the left control bars match some target pattern (using the bottom panels)
- Make the right control bars match the left control bars (by clicking on them)

- The right control bars need to match the left control bars
- The bottom panels are used to set the left control bars to the target pattern
